description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:1.9.1 Docker image with a postgres:latest service and set DATABASE_HOST, DATABASE_NAME, DATABASE_PASSWORD, DATABASE_USER, and MIX_ENV variables for the test environment. Add a single job named mix in the default test stage that runs a before_script to apt-get update, install postgresql-client, execute mix local.rebar --force, mix local.hex --force, mix deps.get, mix ecto.create, and mix ecto.migrate, then runs the script command mix test --cover. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
